shopifyServicePage.title: Shopify Services
shopifyServicePage.intro: From performance tuning to custom app implementation, I help Shopify brands ship faster and scale with confidence.

hero.heading: Make your theme work for you
hero.introSuffix: From porting sections across themes to new blocks, design tokens, and a calmer customizer—I build so merchants can move fast without breaking the storefront.
hero.heroImageAlt: Illustration representing Shopify storefront and ecommerce experience

story.title: What “custom theme work” really unlocks in Shopify
story.description: Shopify themes are not frozen templates. With the right Liquid, schema, and structure, we can reshape how pages are built, how merchants edit them, and how your brand scales across templates—without constantly reopening the codebase for every campaign.

chapters.title: Layouts you love—and an editor your team can run with
chapters.body: Spotted a homepage, collection row, or promo strip in another Shopify theme that fits your vision? We can bring that idea into your store and make it feel native to your brand. At the same time, we can tidy the controls behind the scenes—things like colors, banners, and repeatable content blocks—so day-to-day updates are clearer, safer during sales, and less likely to turn into “we need a developer” every time marketing wants to try something new.
chapters.imageAlt: Illustration representing adaptable storefront sections and layouts

chapters.title: Liquid, JSON templates, and performance-aware markup
chapters.body: Under the hood it’s structured Liquid, metafields, and app blocks where appropriate—written so your storefront stays fast, accessible, and easier to regression-test when Shopify ships platform changes.
chapters.imageAlt: Illustration representing theme code, structure, and performance-minded implementation

chapters.title: Product templates, cards, and merchandising logic
chapters.body: Product grids, badges, variant pickers, and complementary content can all be tailored: metafield-driven badges, collection-specific layouts, and blocks your merchandising team can rearrange in the theme editor.
chapters.imageAlt: Shopify product section with blocks in the theme editor

designSystem.title: A calmer customizer and a real design system—not one-off CSS patches.
designSystem.description: I group related settings into logical sections, use theme presets where they help, and align typography, spacing, and color with CSS variables or a small in-theme token layer. Merchants see fewer cryptic fields, clearer labels, and blocks that read like the components your brand actually uses—so “edit the homepage” stops meaning “file a ticket.”
bullets: Shared section styles and snippets so new pages stay on-brand.
Block-level controls instead of hard-coded layouts where it makes sense.
Documentation and short Loom-style handoffs so your team owns day-two edits confidently.
designSystem.bentoTopImageAlt: Shopify theme customizer with sections, blocks, and settings
designSystem.bentoLeftImageAlt: Shopify theme editor showing image banner section and blocks
designSystem.bentoRightImageAlt: Shopify product template with blocks in the theme editor

tiers.name: Shopify ecommerce
features: Custom Themes, sections, checkout, cart, and PDPs
Storefront extension complete with new customizer settings
Custom Shopify apps and flow automations
tiers.footnote: Larger app MVP scopes are quoted as their own slice after discovery—many engagements start with a storefront or integration sprint.

tiers.name: Website & Fullstack Applications
features: New websites or applications to meet your business needs
Landing pages, marketing sites, and business websites built for speed, clarity, and conversion
Custom frontend and backend features in React, Next.js, and Node.js for real product workflows
API integrations, database wiring, and third-party services

tiers.name: Page Speed & Web Accessibility Audits
features: Full website or page specific audits
Actionable optimizations for both accessibility and page speed

tiers.name: Custom
tiers.headline: Custom pricing
tiers.body: For blended engagements, retainers, and multi-phase programs
useCases: Multi step projects with multiple phases and milestones, such as a new Shopify store with a custom theme and flow automations or application with complex requirements
Private or custom Shopify apps, admin tools, and integration layers
Multi-week implementation sprints with milestones tied to launch or revenue
tiers.howItWorks: We scope out all goals, constraints, success signals, and a fixed fee or staged milestones. You get clarity before commit.
tiers.footnote: Ideal when you need depth without a single-service starting price, or when procurement requires a defined SOW.

faqs.question: What types of businesses do you work with?
faqs.answer: I work with businesses of any size, including brand-new stores and established teams that need technical support to scale.

faqs.question: Can you support both strategy and implementation?
faqs.answer: Yes. I can consult on architecture and process, then implement improvements across frontend, backend, and Shopify ecosystems.

faqs.question: Do you offer short-term and long-term engagement models?
faqs.answer: Yes. You can hire me for project-based work, fixed duration support, or an ongoing monthly/weekly retainer.

faqs.question: Can you audit existing products for performance and accessibility?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. I provide detailed page speed and accessibility audits with prioritized action items and optional implementation support.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Tell me about your store, app, or technical challenge and I will follow up with practical next steps.
contact.availability: Open to project work, consulting engagements, and retainer partnerships.
